languages.text: "Вот и вы, {mf|господин|госпожа}! Убежище совсем рядом — прямо по коридору".

traits.locale_text: "Вот и вы, {mf|господин|госпожа}! Убежище совсем рядом — прямо по коридору".
"Вот и вы, {mf|господин|госпожа}! Убежище совсем рядом — прямо по коридору".

languages.text: "There you are, {mf|master|mistress}! The shelter is real close — straight down this corridor."
languages.original_text: "Вот и вы, {mf|господин|госпожа}! Убежище совсем рядом — прямо по коридору".

traits.locale_text: "There you are, {mf|master|mistress}! The shelter is real close — straight down this corridor."
"There you are, {mf|master|mistress}! The shelter is real close — straight down this corridor."
"There you are, {mf|master|mistress}! The shelter is real close — straight down this corridor."

languages.text: "Da bist du ja, Meister! Der Unterschlupf ist ganz in der Nähe — geradeaus den Gang entlang."
languages.original_text: "There you are, {mf|master|mistress}! The shelter is real close — straight down this corridor."

languages.text: "Vous y êtes, maître ! L'abri est tout proche — au bout de ce couloir."
languages.original_text: "There you are, {mf|master|mistress}! The shelter is real close — straight down this corridor."

languages.text: "你在这儿，主人！避难所就在附近--沿着走廊直走。"
languages.original_text: "There you are, {mf|master|mistress}! The shelter is real close — straight down this corridor."

languages.text: "¡Ahí está, maestro! El refugio está muy cerca, al final de este pasillo".
languages.original_text: "There you are, {mf|master|mistress}! The shelter is real close — straight down this corridor."

languages.text: 「ご主人様、お待たせしました！シェルターはこの通路をまっすぐ行けばすぐそこです」。
languages.original_text: "There you are, {mf|master|mistress}! The shelter is real close — straight down this corridor."

languages.text: "İşte buradasınız, efendim! Sığınak çok yakın — bu koridorun hemen aşağısında."
languages.original_text: "There you are, {mf|master|mistress}! The shelter is real close — straight down this corridor."
